prompt: Orchestrator composes initial tech-researcher message for story 3-1 TLS/ESM escalation.

assertions.text: Has a clearly labeled Task section
Has a Why-this-matters section citing Epic 3 critical path / 6 downstream blockers
Pastes BOTH developer prior attempts (ERR_REQUIRE_ESM + TLS handshake failure) substantively
Explicitly states TLS verification must stay on (no workaround that disables cert validation)
Instructs researcher to message the developer directly, not via team-lead
Names knowledge sources: at minimum package.json (for CJS context) and architecture.md §External integrations
Invokes at least one relevant skill (typescript-clean-code or claude-api)
Defines success criteria (story AC passes, no TLS compromise, etc.)
